name: Fudge Filled Nutty Oatmeal Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Beat together butter and brown sugar until creamy.
3. Add eggs, vanilla extract, and instant coffee powder. Mix well.
4. Stir in oats, flour, baking soda, and salt. Mix until combined (batter will be stiff; stir by hand if necessary).
5. Remove 2 cups of the dough and set aside.
6. Press remaining dough into a 15½ x 10½ inch jelly roll pan.
7. For filling: In a medium saucepan over low heat, melt butter. Add chocolate. Cook, stirring until smooth.
8. Stir in sugar and sweetened condensed milk (1 can). Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and the sugar dissolves.
9. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract.
10. Spread the chocolate filling evenly over the crust.
11. Sprinkle reserved dough over the filling and then sprinkle the remaining walnuts on top.
12. Bake for 25 minutes or until the top is golden brown. Let cool completely in the pan on a wire rack before serving, cut into bars.
(Note: Recipe By: THE DESSERT SHOW)
